title: CUK PG Admission 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: CUK PG Admission 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: CUK PG Admission 2026 registration is now open for 22 postgraduate courses. Last date to apply is June 11, 2026. Check CUK PG 2026 eligibility, application fee, important dates, courses list, and apply online through CUET-PG at cukashmircuet.samarth.edu.in for MBA, M.Tech, MA, M.Sc & more.

content.text: Central University of Kashmir (CUK) has officially opened registration for CUK PG Admission 2026-27. Candidates who have appeared in CUET-PG 2026 can now apply online for 22 postgraduate programmes on the university portal till June 11, 2026 (11:55 PM). Admissions will be offered primarily on the basis of CUET-PG 2026 scores, with first preference given to CMAT for MBA programmes and GATE/CCMT for M.Tech programmes.

This complete guide covers all important details including eligibility, important dates, application process, fees, courses, counselling procedure, and direct links to help students apply successfully.
Direct Link to Open Official Notification: Click Here
Central University of Kashmir is offering admission to 22 PG programmes in the following streams:

items: M.A. : English, Urdu, Mass Communication & Journalism, Economics, Political Science, Kashmiri, Philosophy (Religious Studies)
M.Sc. : Botany, Chemistry, Zoology, Biotechnology, Physics, Mathematics
Professional Programmes : M.Com, LLM, M.Ed., Integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed., M.P.Ed., MBA, MBA (Travel & Tourism), M.Tech (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning), M.Tech (Structural Engineering)

content.text: Apply Online for CUK PG Admission 2026

links.text: Apply Online for CUK PG Admission 2026

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for CUK PG Admission 2026

items: Candidates must have completed a Bachelor’s degree in a relevant discipline from a recognized university.
Minimum aggregate marks: 50% (45% for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/EWS candidates as per norms).
Must have appeared in CUET-PG 2026.
For MBA: CMAT 2026 qualifiers get first preference.
For M.Tech: GATE/CCMT qualifiers get first preference.
Final year students can apply provisionally but must submit proof of passing at the time of admission.

rows: SC / ST / OBC / PwD / EWS / Women

content.text: The fee is non-refundable and must be paid online.
Central University of Kashmir (CUK) is offering admission to 22 Postgraduate programmes for the academic session 2026-27:

sections.heading: How to Apply for CUK PG Admission 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official admission portal: cukashmircuet.samarth.edu.in
Register / Login using your CUET-PG 2026 credentials.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Pay the application fee through online payment modes.
Upload all required documents.
Submit the form and take a printout of the confirmation page.
CUET-PG 2026 Scorecard
Class 10th & 12th Marksheets
Graduation Marksheets & Degree/Provisional Certificate
Category Certificate (if applicable)
Recent Passport Size Photograph & Signature
Valid Photo ID Proof
Merit list will be prepared based on CUET-PG 2026 scores.
Special preference will be given to CMAT for MBA and GATE for M.Tech programmes.
Shortlisted candidates will be called for counselling and document verification.
Final admission is confirmed only after successful document verification and fee payment.
